---
name: Runner finding or package bug
about: Register reproducible Runner behavior and connect it to the canonical program backlog.
---

## Summary

## Runner package version and observed SHA

## Public seam / reproduction

## Expected vs observed

## Evidence and environment

## Classification

- Severity: P0 / P1 / P2 / P3
- Technical and reversible: yes / no
- Proposed Task-ID or work package:
- Requires credential, registration, release or external authorization: yes / no

Actionable findings must be registered in the coordinator `PROGRAM_FINDINGS.json` with a correction task. Do not treat issue checkboxes as the execution queue.
